shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice ·GitHub ⭐ 14065 HTML · Claude Code, Best Practice, Guide, AI Assistant

What it is

An extensive best-practice guide for utilizing Claude Code covering Concepts like Commands, Sub-Agents, Skills, and MCP Servers.

Problems solved

  • Helps users navigate the complexities of Claude Code and maximize its capability by compiling community and official insights into a unified strategy document.

How to get started

Read the sections covering Commands, Sub-Agents, Skills, Workflows, Hooks, and Features to enhance your command-line AI-assisted workflow.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

This documentation acts as a deep-dive handbook for Anthropic's Claude Code, covering advanced topics such as agent architectures, MCP integrations, and tailored commands.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Users often underutilize complex CLI AI tools due to steep learning curves. This guide provides comprehensive overviews and "How To" examples, democratizing advanced usage of AI CLI operations.

3. Technical Architecture

It's a structured Markdown repository categorizing various facets of AI operation paradigms conceptually (Hooks, Sub-Agents, Workflows).

4. Core Implementation

The implementation mostly consists of curated prompts, command flags explanations, and structural templates (e.g., SKILL.md structures for plugins) emphasizing best practices for prompt engineering.

5. Code Organization

It functions as a monolithic README or a series of interconnected markdown files segmenting best practices by operational domains.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Read through the "Sub-Agents" section to understand how to modularize your Claude Code tasks into different .claude/agents/ files.

7. Summary

A crucial resource for developers adopting Anthropic's Claude Code CLI, providing theoretical knowledge and actionable advice to optimize agentic flows.
